ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solvers" (
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solver */,
  "solver_name" TEXT /* Name of the solver algorithm */,
  "factorization_method" TEXT /* Type of factorization method used by the solver */,
  "supports_indefinite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the solver supports indefinite matrices */,
  "out_of_core" INTEGER /* Indicates if the solver can operate out-of-core */,
  "parallelisation" TEXT /* Details on the parallelization method used */,
  "solver_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the solver */,
  "default_version" TEXT /* Default version of the solver to be used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the solver is currently active and available for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factorization_methods" (
  "factorization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factorization method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the factorization method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factorization method */,
  "is_parallelizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the factorization method can be parallelized */,
  "is_out_of_core" INTEGER /* Indicates if the factorization method supports out-of-core operations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factorization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solver this setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is mandatory for the solver to function */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* The default value for the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_settings_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance log entry */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solver for which this log is recorded */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the solver in seconds */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during execution in MB */,
  "date_logged" TEXT /* Date when the performance was logged */,
  "solver_version" TEXT /* The version of the solver used during the performance log */,
  "input_size" INTEGER /* The size of the input matrix for the solver */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* The rate of errors or failures during the solver execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user in the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the solver */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the solver was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the solver */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the solver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solver associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the solver */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release for the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is considered stable */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* The date when the version will be deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A JSON object or a comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver this parameter is associated with */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is mandatory for the solver to function */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* The default value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_parameters_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)
